custom_css: Header .title-3d{font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:#fff!important;text-shadow:2px 2px 0 #e10600,4px 4px 0 #000!important;display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;gap:10px!important}header .title-3d::before{content:none!important}header button{background:#15151e!important;border:2px solid #e10600!important;border-radius:4px!important;color:#fff!important;text-transform:uppercase!important}aside .btn-pulse,#main-fire-btn{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#e10600,#333,#e10600)!important;color:#fff!important;font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;border-radius:4px!important;box-shadow:0 4px 15px rgba(225,6,0,0.4)!important;animation:f1-speed 2s infinite linear!important;background-size:200% auto!important;border:none!important}#main-fire-btn:active,aside .btn-pulse:active{transform:skewX(-10deg) scale(0.95)!important;filter:brightness(1.5)!important}@keyframes f1-speed{0%{background-position:0% 50%}100%{background-position:200% 50%}}#streak-input{background:#1f1f27!important;border:1px solid #38383f!important;border-left:4px solid #e10600!important;color:#fff!important;border-radius:2px!important}.tab-btn.active{color:#e10600!important;font-style:italic!important}.tab-btn.active::after{background:#e10600!important;height:4px!important}.item-card.selected-card{border-color:#e10600!important;box-shadow:5px 5px 0px #000!important}
